# Phase-17 — Industry Vertical Platforms

> Architect regulated, high-stakes data platforms across key industries.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 61-63**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Healthcare Data Platforms](01_Healthcare_Data_Platforms.prompt.md) | `Healthcare_Data_Platforms.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Financial Data Platforms](02_Financial_Data_Platforms.prompt.md) | `Financial_Data_Platforms.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 03 | [Aviation Data Platforms](03_Aviation_Data_Platforms.prompt.md) | `Aviation_Data_Platforms.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 04 | [Smart Cities](04_Smart_Cities.prompt.md) | `Smart_Cities.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 05 | [Retail and E-Commerce Data](05_Retail_and_E_Commerce_Data.prompt.md) | `Retail_and_Ecommerce_Data.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
